About

Celeste Romer-Sargent combines government administrative experience with a decade of freelance photography. She currently supports senior leadership at the Disaster Risk Management (DRM) Authority while operating Focal Point Photography for weddings, events, schools, and lifestyle clients across Nassau and the Family Islands.

DRM Authority Focal Point Photography Office Administration Weddings & Events Dance Picture Day

DRM Authority

Administrative support for the Disaster Operations Division — helping keep disaster response, fleet, and warehouse operations organized, documented, and ready when The Bahamas needs them.

Administrative Clerk

Disaster Operations Division · Disaster Risk Management (DRM) Authority

Sep 16, 2024 — Present

Assistant to the Assistant Managing Director — Disaster Operations / Fleet / Warehouse

Disaster Operations

Administrative support for division leadership during planning, response coordination, and day-to-day disaster operations workflows.

Fleet Administration

Data logging, record keeping, and correspondence support for fleet-related documentation and operational tracking.

Warehouse Administration

Filing, communications, and office support for warehouse units — keeping supplies, records, and requests organized and accessible.

Key Responsibilities

  • Provide direct administrative support to the Assistant Managing Director, Disaster Operations Division.
  • Maintain data logging and record keeping across disaster operations, fleet, and warehouse functions.
  • Manage filing systems, phone communications, and email correspondence for division leadership and staff.
  • Prepare correspondence, reports, and office materials using Microsoft Word, Excel, and Outlook.
  • Support daily office operations while managing multiple tasks accurately and meeting deadlines under pressure.

Professional Summary

Detail-oriented administrative professional serving as Administrative Clerk and assistant to the Assistant Managing Director of the Disaster Operations Division at DRM Authority, supporting disaster operations, fleet, and warehouse functions. Combined with a decade of freelance photography serving weddings, events, schools, and lifestyle clients. Recognized for strong data logging, record keeping, organizational skills, calm performance under pressure, excellent customer service, and professional correspondence management.

  • Executive administrative support to Assistant Managing Director

  • Data logging and record keeping across multiple divisions
  • Filing, phone, and email correspondence management
  • General office administration and document preparation
  • Microsoft Word, Excel, and Outlook
  • Front-desk reception and stakeholder support
  • Scheduling, prioritization, and multitasking in fast-paced settings
  • Confidential document handling and attention to detail

  • Event, wedding, portrait, and lifestyle photography
